welcome_subtitle: A celebration of fine champagne and community
what_we_do_description: On 13-14-15 March 2026, the Meeting and Event Centre Staf Versluys in Bredene forms the vibrant backdrop for a large centralized champagne event. Champagne producers from across the champagne region gather in one location to present their cuvées to the public.
what_we_do_for_everyone: Visitors can enjoy a unique selection of champagnes direct from the source for 3 days — from small family houses to renowned names. The champagne festival offers the rare chance to discover diverse styles and terroirs without travelling to France.
what_we_do_feature1_description: Meet producers from around the world and learn about their craft.
what_we_do_feature2_description: Sample a wide variety of champagnes from different regions.
what_we_do_feature3_description: Connect with fellow champagne enthusiasts and experts.
next_festival_description: If you're looking for a place to meet multiple producers in one weekend and taste, purchase and take home their cuvées, then the champagne festival in Bredene is your bubble paradise.
schedule_description: View our detailed festival schedule with events, tastings, and special presentations.
schedule_no_events: No events scheduled for this day.
schedule_events_fri_end_description: Closing of the festival on Friday.
schedule_events_sat_exchange_description: Opening of the exchange fair for collectors.
schedule_events_sat_opening_description: Official opening of the festival on Saturday with ongoing champagne tasting.
schedule_events_sat_party_description: Festive evening with house DJ "Moustache" and champagne.
schedule_events_sat_end_description: Closing of the festival and party on Saturday.
schedule_events_sun_breakfast_descriptio: Champagne breakfast in support of a local good cause (by reservation only).
schedule_events_sun_opening_description: Opening of the festival on Sunday with ongoing champagne tasting.
schedule_events_sun_end_description: Closing of the festival on Sunday.
countdown_concluded: The festival has concluded. See you next time!
faq_q1: What is the Champagne Festival about?
faq_a1: The Champagne Festival is a celebration of fine champagne, bringing together producers, enthusiasts, and the community for tastings, workshops, and social events.
faq_a2: The next festival is scheduled for March 13-15, 2026 in Bredene. Mark your calendars for a weekend of bubbles and festivities.
faq_q3: Where will the festival be held?
faq_a3: The festival will take place at the Meeting and Event Centre Staf Versluys, Kapelstraat 76, 8450 Bredene.
faq_a4: Please contact us at nancy.cattrysse@telenet.be for information about tickets and reservations.
faq_q5: Can I become a sponsor or vendor?
faq_a5: Yes. We welcome partnerships with businesses related to champagne, food, and luxury lifestyle. Please use our contact form to express your interest.

privacy_intro: This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your personal information when you use our website or services.
privacy_data_collection_content: When you use our contact form, we may collect your name, email address, and any message content you provide. This information is only used to respond to your inquiries.
privacy_data_use_content: We use the information you provide through our contact form solely to respond to your inquiries and communicate with you about the Champagne Festival.
privacy_data_protection_content: We implement appropriate security measures to protect your personal information from unauthorized access, alteration, or disclosure.
privacy_cookies_content: Our website may use cookies to enhance your browsing experience. You can set your browser to refuse cookies, but this may limit some functionality.
privacy_contact_us_content: If you have any questions about our privacy policy, please contact us using the contact form on our website.
